message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
hide methods

class PropertyRelation << (R,#FFFFFF) >> {
  relationType : string [1..1]
}

class ClassificationRelation << (R,#FFFFFF) >> {
  relationType : string [1..1]
}

class Property << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  activationDateUtc : dateTime [1..1]
  code : string [1..1]
  connectedPropertyCode : string [0..*]
  countryOfOrigin : string [0..1]
  countryOfUse : string [0..*]
  creatorLanguageCode : string [0..1]
  dataType : string [0..1]
  deActivationDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  definition : string [0..1]
  deprecationExplanation : string [0..1]
  description : string [0..1]
  dimension : string [0..1]
  dimensionAmountOfSubstance : int [0..1]
  dimensionElectricCurrent : int [0..1]
  dimensionLength : int [0..1]
  dimensionLuminousIntensity : int [0..1]
  dimensionMass : int [0..1]
  dimensionThermodynamicTemperature : int [0..1]
  dimensionTime : int [0..1]
  documentReference : string [0..1]
  dynamicParameterPropertyCodes : string [0..*]
  example : string [0..1]
  isDynamic : boolean [1..1]
  maxExclusive : decimal [0..1]
  maxInclusive : decimal [0..1]
  methodOfMeasurement : string [0..*]
  minExclusive : decimal [0..1]
  minInclusive : decimal [0..1]
  name : string [1..1]
  pattern : string [0..1]
  physicalQuantity : string [0..1]
  propertyValueKind : PropertyValueKind [0..1]
  replacedObjectCodes : string [0..*]
  replacingObjectCodes : string [0..*]
  revisionDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  revisionNumber : int [0..1]
  status : string [1..1]
  subdivisionsOfUse : string [0..*]
  textFormat : string [0..1]
  uid : string [0..1]
  unit : string [0..*]
  versionDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  versionNumber : int [0..1]
  visualRepresentationUri : iri [0..1]
}

class ClassificationProperty << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  activationDateUtc : dateTime [1..1]
  code : string [1..1]
  countryOfOrigin : string [0..1]
  countryOfUse : string [0..*]
  creatorLanguageCode : string [0..1]
  dataType : string [0..1]
  deActivationDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  definition : string [0..1]
  deprecationExplanation : string [0..1]
  description : string [0..1]
  dimension : string [0..1]
  dimensionAmountOfSubstance : int [0..1]
  dimensionElectricCurrent : int [0..1]
  dimensionLength : int [0..1]
  dimensionLuminousIntensity : int [0..1]
  dimensionMass : int [0..1]
  dimensionThermodynamicTemperature : int [0..1]
  dimensionTime : int [0..1]
  documentReference : string [0..1]
  dynamicParameterPropertyCode : string [0..*]
  example : string [0..1]
  isDynamic : boolean [0..1]
  isRequired : boolean [0..1]
  isWritable : boolean [0..1]
  maxExclusive : decimal [0..1]
  maxInclusive : decimal [0..1]
  methodOfMeasurement : string [0..*]
  minExclusive : decimal [0..1]
  minInclusive : decimal [0..1]
  name : string [1..1]
  pattern : string [0..1]
  physicalQuantity : string [0..1]
  predefinedValue : string [0..1]
  propertySet : string [0..1]
  propertyValueKind : PropertyValueKind [0..1]
  replacedObjectCode : string [0..*]
  replacingObjectCode : string [0..*]
  revisionDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  revisionNumber : int [0..1]
  status : string [1..1]
  subdivisionOfUse : string [0..*]
  symbol : string [0..1]
  textFormat : string [0..1]
  uid : string [0..1]
  unit : string [0..*]
  versionDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  versionNumber : int [0..1]
  visualRepresentationUri : iri [0..1]
}

class Classification << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  activationDateUtc : dateTime [1..1]
  classificationType : ClassificationType [0..1]
  code : string [1..1]
  countryOfOrigin : string [0..1]
  countryOfUse : string [0..*]
  creatorLanguageCode : string [0..1]
  deActivationDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  definition : string [0..1]
  deprecationExplanation : string [0..1]
  documentReference : string [0..1]
  name : string [1..1]
  referenceCode : string [0..1]
  relatedIfcEntityName : string [0..*]
  replacedObjectCode : string [0..*]
  replacingObjectCode : string [0..*]
  revisionDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  revisionNumber : int [0..1]
  status : string [1..1]
  subdivisionOfUse : string [0..*]
  synonym : string [0..*]
  uid : string [0..1]
  versionDateUtc : dateTime [0..1]
  versionNumber : int [0..1]
  visualRepresentationUri : iri [0..1]
}

class Domain << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  copyrightNotice : string [0..1]
  languageCode : string [1..1]
  lastUpdatedDate : dateTime [1..1]
  license : string [0..1]
  licenseUrl : string [0..1]
  moreInfoUrl : string [0..1]
  name : string [1..1]
  releaseDate : dateTime [0..1]
  status : string [0..1]
  version : string [1..1]
}

class PropertyValue << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  bsd:value : string [1..1]
  code : string [0..1]
  description : string [0..1]
  sortNumber : int [0..1]
}

class Country << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  code : string [1..1]
  name : string [1..1]
}

class Language << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  isocode : string [1..1]
  name : string [1..1]
}

class ReferenceDocument << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  date : dateTime [1..1]
  name : string [1..1]
  title : string [1..1]
}

class Unit << (C,#FFFFFF) >> {
  code : string [1..1]
  name : string [1..1]
  symbol : string [0..1]
}

PropertyRelation "0..*" -- "2..2" Property : related\nrelation
ClassificationRelation "0..*" -- "2..2" Classification : related\nrelation

Property "1..1" -- "0..*" ClassificationProperty : classificationProperty\nproperty
Classification "0..*" -- "0..*" ClassificationProperty : classification\nclassificationProperty

Classification "0..*" -- "1..1" Domain : domain\nclassification

Classification "0..*" -- "0..1" Classification : parentClassification\nchildClassification

Property "0..*" -- "0..*" PropertyValue : allowedValue
ClassificationProperty "0..*" -- "0..*" PropertyValue : allowedValue
@enduml
